notes: Basic with no effort, I get the initial launch page, no animation or anything, and pressing "press any key", game just hangs upon loading indefinitely with sound accelerating oddly at different intervals.  Definitely borked.
title: WARRIORS OROCHI 4 - 無双OROCHI３

notes: I've attempted to run this in a number of ways, trying combinations of esync, d3d toggles, nothing gets past actual loading of either story mode, or battle arena. I tried disabling movies in options prior to starting either mode, and moving all setting to lowest for graphics, and still crashes when loading past either story or battle arena mode. I also tested all versions of available proton releases, on 3.16-6 boots the game up, all others crash upon start of the game immediately.
title: WARRIORS OROCHI 4 - 無双OROCHI３

notes: Reinstalled mint 19.1 with latest 4.30 nvidia driver. Installed game on my .local drive. Tweaked nothing. Loaded into game and, while being a bit choppy initially, it played smooth for at least 5 minutes using the cloud save.
title: WARRIORS OROCHI 4 - 無双OROCHI３

notes: I have since played the game for at least 10 hours from my previous review lol... It currently plays pretty much perfectly with no tweaks.. One more game that works.
title: WARRIORS OROCHI 4 - 無双OROCHI３
